subject: Re: Ответ: Re: Перенаправить: someone sent you a video!
body:
no the island.... IF I go Paris next week, would you lioke to visit

----- Original Message ----
From: Ekaterina Mitr <ekaterina_mitr@yahoo.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, November 16, 2006 2:54:13 AM
Subject: Ответ: Re: Перенаправить: someone sent you a video!

what am I doing? ..missing you so much  :) 
   
  I ll come in NY on the 28th of december... ll you be in there? I ll stay in NY only 4 days and then going to Miami..
   
  Take care 

"J. Epstein" <jeeproject@yahoo.com> пишет: 
          no,,, come visit  soon,,,what are you doing

  Was this video from you? I can't stop laughing....
